ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
python_min:
- '3.10'

about.summary: Continuous control environments and MuJoCo Python bindings.

tests.script: pytest --pyargs dm_control -v -k "not (render or viewer or glfw or Camera or Depth or Scene or Overlay or Context or Pixels or visualize or test_env_runs_cmu_humanoid_heterogeneous_forage or test_env_runs_cmu_humanoid_maze_forage or test_env_runs_cmu_humanoid_run_gaps or test_env_runs_cmu_humanoid_run_walls or test_env_runs_rodent_escape_bowl or test_env_runs_rodent_maze_forage or test_env_runs_rodent_run_gaps or test_env_runs_rodent_two_touch or test_termination_and_discount or test_contact or test_observables or test_initial_state_is_randomized40 or test_observation_arrays_dont_share_memory40 or test_observations_dont_contain_constant_elements40 or test_task_conforms_to_spec40 or test_can_compile_and_step_simulation or test_evaluate_observable0 or test_evaluate_observable1 or test_evaluate_observable2 or test_evaluate_observable3 or test_evaluate_observable4 or test_evaluate_observable5 or test_task_runs1 or test_task_runs10 or test_task_runs12 or test_task_runs14 or test_task_runs16 or test_task_runs18 or test_task_runs20 or test_task_runs22 or test_task_runs24 or test_task_runs3 or test_task_runs5 or test_task_runs8 or test_environment_is_deterministic40)"

about.summary: Continuous control environments and MuJoCo Python bindings.

tests.script: pytest --pyargs dm_control -v -k "not (render or viewer or glfw or Camera or Depth or Scene or Overlay or Context or Pixels or visualize or test_env_runs_cmu_humanoid_heterogeneous_forage or test_env_runs_cmu_humanoid_maze_forage or test_env_runs_cmu_humanoid_run_gaps or test_env_runs_cmu_humanoid_run_walls or test_env_runs_rodent_escape_bowl or test_env_runs_rodent_maze_forage or test_env_runs_rodent_run_gaps or test_env_runs_rodent_two_touch or test_termination_and_discount or test_contact or test_observables or test_initial_state_is_randomized40 or test_observation_arrays_dont_share_memory40 or test_observations_dont_contain_constant_elements40 or test_task_conforms_to_spec40 or test_can_compile_and_step_simulation or test_evaluate_observable0 or test_evaluate_observable1 or test_evaluate_observable2 or test_evaluate_observable3 or test_evaluate_observable4 or test_evaluate_observable5 or test_task_runs1 or test_task_runs10 or test_task_runs12 or test_task_runs14 or test_task_runs16 or test_task_runs18 or test_task_runs20 or test_task_runs22 or test_task_runs24 or test_task_runs3 or test_task_runs5 or test_task_runs8 or test_environment_is_deterministic40)"

name: dm-control
raw_meta_yaml:
context:
  name: dm-control
  version: "1.0.36"
  mujoco_min_version: "3.4.0"

package:
  name: ${{ name|lower }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/d/dm_control/dm_control-${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: a92e4c077856683b69773e389802f14a2910ec50a47f788776bc73118cec2ad6

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: python
  script: ${{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation

requirements:
  build:
    - mujoco ==${{ mujoco_min_version }}
  host:
    - python ${{ python_min }}.*
    - pip
    - mujoco ==${{ mujoco_min_version }}
    - pyparsing >=3.0.0
    - setuptools >=40.6.0
    - wheel
    - absl-py >=0.7.0
  run:
    - python >=${{ python_min }}
    - absl-py >=0.7.0
    - dm-env
    - dm-tree !=0.1.2
    - glfw
    - pyglfw
    - labmaze
    - lxml
    - mujoco >=${{ mujoco_min_version }}
    - numpy >=1.9.0
    - protobuf >=3.19.4
    - pyopengl >=3.1.4
    - pyparsing >=3.0.0
    - requests
    - setuptools !=50.0.0
    - scipy
    - tqdm

tests:
  - python:
      imports:
        - dm_control
      pip_check: true
      python_version: ${{ python_min }}.*
  - script:
      - pytest --pyargs dm_control -v -k "not (render or viewer or glfw or Camera or Depth or Scene or Overlay or Context or Pixels or visualize or test_env_runs_cmu_humanoid_heterogeneous_forage or test_env_runs_cmu_humanoid_maze_forage or test_env_runs_cmu_humanoid_run_gaps or test_env_runs_cmu_humanoid_run_walls or test_env_runs_rodent_escape_bowl or test_env_runs_rodent_maze_forage or test_env_runs_rodent_run_gaps or test_env_runs_rodent_two_touch or test_termination_and_discount or test_contact or test_observables or test_initial_state_is_randomized40 or test_observation_arrays_dont_share_memory40 or test_observations_dont_contain_constant_elements40 or test_task_conforms_to_spec40 or test_can_compile_and_step_simulation or test_evaluate_observable0 or test_evaluate_observable1 or test_evaluate_observable2 or test_evaluate_observable3 or test_evaluate_observable4 or test_evaluate_observable5 or test_task_runs1 or test_task_runs10 or test_task_runs12 or test_task_runs14 or test_task_runs16 or test_task_runs18 or test_task_runs20 or test_task_runs22 or test_task_runs24 or test_task_runs3 or test_task_runs5 or test_task_runs8 or test_environment_is_deterministic40)"
    requirements:
      run:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
        - pip
        - pytest
        - mock
        - h5py
        - pillow
        - mujoco ==${{ mujoco_min_version }}


about:
  homepage: https://github.com/deepmind/dm_control
  summary: Continuous control environments and MuJoCo Python bindings.
  license: Apache-2.0
  license_file: LICENSE

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - traversaro
